title: Payment Schedule
description: Defines when payment is due for a payment term. A schedule can represent a single payment or a recurring series of payments.

id.description: Unique identifier for this payment schedule.

type.description: Payment timing type. 'immediate' = captured immediately at order creation. 'deferred' = captured later per due_at schedule.

due_at.description: When the payment is due. Protocol semantics require this for deferred schedules and omit it for immediate schedules.

percentage.description: Percentage of the selected term's line-item total due for each occurrence of this schedule. For recurring schedules, apply the percentage to each occurrence.
